tools.name: initialization.postStoreDetail
tools.description: Stores payment details under the `PAYOUT` recurring contract. These payment details can be used later to submit a payout via the `/submitThirdParty` call.

tools.name: initialization.postStoreDetailAndSubmitThirdParty
tools.description:
Submits a payout and stores its details for subsequent payouts.

The submitted payout must be confirmed or declined either by a reviewer or via `/confirmThirdParty` or `/declineThirdParty` calls.

tools.name: initialization.postSubmitThirdParty
tools.description:
Submits a payout using the previously stored payment details. To store payment details, use the `/storeDetail` API call.

The submitted payout must be confirmed or declined either by a reviewer or via `/confirmThirdParty` or `/declineThirdParty` calls.

tools.name: instantPayouts.postPayout
tools.description: With this call, you can pay out to your customers, and funds will be made available within 30 minutes on the cardholder's bank account (this is dependent on whether the issuer supports this functionality). Instant card payouts are only supported for Visa and Mastercard cards.

tools.name: reviewing.postConfirmThirdParty
tools.description:
Confirms a previously submitted payout.

To cancel a payout, use the `/declineThirdParty` endpoint.

tools.name: reviewing.postDeclineThirdParty
tools.description:
Cancels a previously submitted payout.

To confirm and send a payout, use the `/confirmThirdParty` endpoint.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
